meanings.usage: 指人或动物天生的、不需要学习的行为反应
指对食物、环境等造成污染
指引起愤怒或不满的行为
指对令人不快事物的强烈反感
形容人工作努力、不知疲倦
通常指移动中的一大群人或动物，带贬义
形容超出寻常、令人惊讶的事物
形容被某事物吸引、沉迷其中
指可以遮风挡雨的地方或保护
指植物因缺水或衰老而枯萎
一种吸食植物汁液的害虫
指小步快速移动，常带慌张含义
指大量昆虫或人聚集移动
指解决问题的巧妙方法和创新能力
形容食物或水果味道甜美诱人

examples.en: We regard them as unnecessary creatures that do more harm than good.
examples.zh: 我们认为它们是无用的生物，弊大于利。

examples.en: We continually wage war on them, for they contaminate our food.
examples.zh: 我们不断地对它们发动战争，因为它们污染我们的食物。

examples.en: They sting or bite without provocation.
examples.zh: 它们无缘无故地蜇人或咬人。

examples.en: Knowing that the industrious ant lives in a highly organized society does nothing to prevent us from being filled with revulsion.
examples.zh: 尽管知道勤劳的蚂蚁生活在高度组织化的社会中，这并不能阻止我们对它们产生厌恶感。

examples.en: Who has not stood in awe at the sight of a spider pouncing on a fly?
examples.zh: 看到蜘蛛扑向苍蝇时，谁没有敬畏地驻足观看？

examples.en: Who has not stood in awe at the sight of a spider pouncing on a fly?
examples.zh: 看到蜘蛛扑向苍蝇时，谁没有敬畏地驻足观看？

examples.en: I immediately embarked on an experiment.
examples.zh: 我立刻着手进行一项实验。

examples.en: I got up early next morning hoping to find that the ants had given up in despair.
examples.zh: 第二天一大早我起床，希望发现蚂蚁已经绝望地放弃了。

examples.en: Instead, I saw that they had discovered a new route.
examples.zh: 然而，我发现它们已经找到了一条新的路线。

examples.en: The ants had been quick to find an answer to my thoroughly unscientific methods!
examples.zh: 蚂蚁很快就找到了对付我完全不科学的方法的答案！

grammar.title: 现在完成进行时 (Present Perfect Continuous)
grammar.definition: 表示从过去开始一直持续到现在并且可能继续下去的动作，常与all morning/afternoon, for hours, since等时间状语连用
grammar.usage: 强调动作的持续性、反复性或持续产生的结果

examples.en: We have been brought up to fear insects.
examples.zh: 我们从小就被教育要害怕昆虫。

examples.en: I have been learning English for five years.

grammar.title: 让步状语从句 (Concessive Clause)
grammar.definition: 表示虽然存在某种情况，但主句的动作或状态仍然成立
grammar.structure: even though / even if / although / though + 从句；no matter how + 从句
grammar.usage: 用于表达转折关系，强调尽管存在困难或相反情况

examples.en: No matter how much we like honey, or how much we have read about the uncanny sense of direction which bees possess, we have a horror of being stung.
examples.zh: 无论我们多么喜欢蜂蜜，或者我们读过多少关于蜜蜂具有不可思议的方向感的文章，我们仍然害怕被蜇。

examples.en: Even though it failed to get rid of the ants, it kept me fascinated.
examples.zh: 虽然它没能消灭蚂蚁，但它让我着迷了24个小时。

grammar.title: 双重否定疑问句 (Negative Question)
grammar.definition: 用否定形式提问，但期望得到肯定回答，表示强调
grammar.structure: Who/What + has not + 动词...?(谁能不...呢?)
grammar.usage: 用于反问，强调说话人认为大家都会有某种感受或行为

examples.en: Who has not stood in awe at the sight of a spider pouncing on a fly?
examples.zh: 看到蜘蛛扑向苍蝇时，谁没有敬畏地驻足观看？

examples.en: Who has not experienced this feeling?
examples.zh: 谁没有体验过这种感觉呢？

sentencePatterns.pattern: No matter how + much/how/形容词..., + 主句

original.en: No matter how much we like honey, or how much we have read about the uncanny sense of direction which bees possess, we have a horror of being stung.
original.zh: 无论我们多么喜欢蜂蜜，或者我们读过多少关于蜜蜂不可思议的方向感的文章，我们仍然害怕被蜇。

imitations.en: No matter how hard I tried, I couldn't solve the problem.
imitations.zh: 无论我多么努力，我都无法解决这个问题。

imitations.en: No matter how expensive the phone is, people will buy it.
imitations.zh: 无论手机多贵，人们都会买。

sentencePatterns.pattern: We have been + 过去分词 + to + 动词原形

original.en: We have been brought up to fear insects.
original.zh: 我们从小就被教育要害怕昆虫。

imitations.en: We have been taught to respect the elderly.
imitations.zh: 我们从小就被教导要尊重老人。

imitations.en: Children have been encouraged to read more books.
imitations.zh: 孩子们一直被鼓励多读书。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Who has not + 过去分词 + at the sight of...?

original.en: Who has not stood in awe at the sight of a spider pouncing on a fly?
original.zh: 看到蜘蛛扑向苍蝇时，谁没有敬畏地驻足观看？

imitations.en: Who has not felt surprised at the news?
imitations.zh: 听到这个消息时，谁没有感到惊讶？

imitations.en: Who has not experienced loneliness in a foreign country?
imitations.zh: 在异国他乡时，谁没有经历过孤独？

original.en: I am especially proud of it, not only because it has survived several severe winters, but because it occasionally produces luscious peaches.
original.zh: 我特别为它感到骄傲，不仅因为它度过了几个严冬，而且因为它偶尔会结出甘美的桃子。

imitations.en: I love this city, not only because it has beautiful scenery, but because the people are friendly.
imitations.zh: 我爱这座城市，不仅因为它有美丽的风景，而且因为人们很友好。

imitations.en: She is a good teacher, not only because she is patient, but because she is passionate.
imitations.zh: 她是一位好老师，不仅因为她有耐心，而且因为她充满热情。
